name: LINE WORKS
description: WorksMobiles enterprise chat used by 30k+ Japanese companies — bots, calendar and OAuth 2.0 admin APIs.

seo.title: LINE WORKS — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: LINE WORKS: WorksMobiles enterprise chat used by 30k+ Japanese companies — bots, calendar and OAuth 2.0 admin APIs.

when_to_use: Enterprise bot API for workflow automation in Japan
Calendar API integration for Japanese business scheduling
Admin API for managing 30k+ company workspace
OAuth 2.0 for secure SSO in Japanese enterprise apps
Notification bots connected to monitoring systems

pros: Widely adopted by Japanese enterprises and SMBs
Calendar, drive and chat bundled with OAuth APIs
Bots and webhooks reasonable for workflow automation
Compliance and admin features fit JP enterprise
cons: Global appeal very limited outside Japan
UI and search still feel regional in polish
Pricing and plans can be confusing to decode
review.verdict: Strong enterprise chat suite inside Japan; outside, Slack or Teams remain the obvious defaults.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises wanting bundled chat, calendar and drive with APIs
review.not_for: Globally distributed teams or dev-first collaboration use cases

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
